TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ameenah_Gurib, title = Ameenah_Gurib, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ameenah_Gurib} }

S.FORM: Ameenah Gurib ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 10, Ameenah Gurib, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1959) mrhuw Mauritus ta' misuw hya' ga Ameenah Gurib, aring ryax tay 5 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Ameenah Gurib mqwas biru sa pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy sa Saint-Patrice. Ameenah Gurib mqwas biru sa pqwsan biru seneng sa Mahébourg Loreto Convent. Ameenah Gurib, kawas tay 1983 tmasuq mqwas biru sa Surrey pqwsan biru krahu. Ameenah Gurib tmasuq mqwas biru sa Exeter 研究所. qnxan nya Ameenah Gurib maki tay kawas 1988 msqun ki Anwar Fakim, tehuk misuw qani, maki 2 la'iy. mintzyuwaw nya Ameenah Gurib hiya ga m'sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Ameenah Gurib ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 10, Ameenah Gurib, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1959) mrhuw Mauritus ta' misuw hya' ga Ameenah Gurib, aring ryax tay 5 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Ameenah Gurib mqwas biru sa pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy sa Saint-Patrice. Ameenah Gurib mqwas biru sa pqwsan biru seneng sa Mahébourg Loreto Convent. Ameenah Gurib, kawas tay 1983 tmasuq mqwas biru sa Surrey pqwsan biru krahu. Ameenah Gurib tmasuq mqwas biru sa Exeter 研究所. qnxan nya Ameenah Gurib maki tay kawas 1988 msqun ki Anwar Fakim, tehuk misuw qani, maki 2 la'iy. mintzyuwaw nya Ameenah Gurib hiya ga m'sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ameenaħ ɣuriβ rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, ameenaħ ɣuriβ, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw mauritus~ɕ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ameenaħ ɣuriβ, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja ameenaħ ɣuriβ mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj s~ɕa s~ɕaint-patriʦ~ʨe. ameenaħ ɣuriβ mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ s~ɕa maħ*βourɣ loreto ʦ~ʨon*ent. ameenaħ ɣuriβ, kawas~ɕ taj **** tmas~ɕuq mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa s~ɕurrej pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. ameenaħ ɣuriβ tmas~ɕuq mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa exeter ***. qnxan nja ameenaħ ɣuriβ maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki anwar *akim, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani, maki * laʔij. mintzjuwaw nja ameenaħ ɣuriβ ħija ɣa mʔs~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
